fields.description: UUID generated by the cart at Confirm tap. Idempotency key for submit_retail_sale — duplicate calls with the same id return the original Sales Invoice without creating a new one. T0-1 per docs/inbox/2026-05-04_audit_synthesis_decisions.md.
fields.label: Client Request ID

fields.description: Set on insert. Records older than 24h are purged by the daily scheduler job hamilton_erp.api.purge_old_idempotency_records.
fields.label: Created At
